notifUserWelcomeBody: Your account has been created successfully.
notifProjectMatchedBody: The project "{projectTitle}" has advanced in the workflow.
notifProjectActivatedBody: The project "{projectTitle}" is now in progress.
notifProjectClosingBody: All phases of "{projectTitle}" have been validated.
notifPhaseEvidenceUploadedClientBody: The worker submitted evidence for phase "{phaseName}" in "{projectTitle}".
notifPhaseUnderReviewBody: Phase "{phaseName}" of "{projectTitle}" is awaiting your validation.
notifPhaseValidatedClientBody: Phase "{phaseName}" of project "{projectTitle}" has been validated.
notifPhaseRejectedWorkerBody: Phase "{phaseName}" of "{projectTitle}" was rejected and needs adjustments.
notifPhaseRejectedClientBody: Phase "{phaseName}" of "{projectTitle}" has been marked as rejected.
notifContractCreatedBody: You have been assigned to project "{projectTitle}". Sign the contract to continue.
notifWorkerInvitedBody: You have been selected for the project "{projectTitle}".
notifWorkerAssignedBody: You are assigned to the project "{projectTitle}".
notifContractSignedClientBody: The contract for project "{projectTitle}" has been signed by the worker.
notifContractSignedWorkerBody: You have signed the contract for project "{projectTitle}".
notifEscrowHeldBody: The funds for project "{projectTitle}" are held in escrow.
notifEscrowReleasedWorkerBody: The payment for project "{projectTitle}" has been released.
notifEscrowReleasedClientBody: The payment for project "{projectTitle}" has been transferred successfully.
notifPaymentFailedBody: Could not complete the payment for project "{projectTitle}".
notifWorkerRatedBody: You received a score of {score} on project "{projectTitle}".
notifInviteRedeemedClientBody: You can track phases and complete payment for "{projectTitle}".
